articles.description: Are Arsenal now firmly in pole position to be Premier League champions after the Gunners went six points clear of Manchester City with a 3-0 win over Fulham.
articles.title: Premier League title race: Advantage Arsenal over Man City after Fulham win

articles.description: Lando Norris says the Formula 1 drivers will be "thrown in at the deep end" by expected wet conditions for the Miami Grand Prix.
articles.title: Miami Grand Prix: Lando Norris says drivers 'thrown in deep end' for expected wet race

articles.description: Mark Allen suffers a devastating final-frame World Championship semi-final defeat by Wu Yize - after missing a simple match-winning black to win.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026 results: Wu Yize defeats Mark Allen in dramatic semi-final, Shaun Murphy beats John Higgins

articles.description: The talk before the season was that Arsenal needed a 20-goal-a-season striker to win a trophy - and now they finally have one in Viktor Gyokeres.
articles.title: Arsenal: Has Viktor Gyokeres proved his critics wrong?

articles.description: Tottenham were the biggest winners as fellow Premier League strugglers West Ham hit the woodwork four times in their 3-0 defeat at Brentford.
articles.title: Has West Ham's defeat by Brentford opened relegation escape route for Tottenham?

articles.description: Naoya Inoue cements his legacy as a boxing great with a unanimous decision win against fellow Japanese Junto Nakatani in Tokyo.
articles.title: Inoue v Nakatani: Naoya Inoue beats Junto Nakatani in Tokyo to remain undisputed

articles.description: Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli bounces back from a difficult sprint race to take pole position for the Miami Grand Prix.
articles.title: Miami Grand Prix: Kimi Antonelli on pole ahead of Max Verstappen

articles.description: Henry Arundell was always destined to play for Bath but has found his way into the blue, black and white via a lonely stint in Paris.
articles.title: Henry Arundell: Bath wing on his roundabout route to Champions Cup semi-final

articles.description: Barcelona are just two points away from winning the La Liga title after beating Osasuna 2-1.
articles.title: Osasuna 1-2 Barcelona: Lewandowski and Torres score as La Liga leaders move closer to title.

articles.description: Ipswich Town have won promotion from the Championship for the second time in three years - but are they better equipped for the Premier League in 2026?
articles.title: Ipswich Town: Are Tractor Boys better equipped for Premier League?
